bibliographic_info.title: BDSet: A First-ever BDS Satellite-based PPP Augmentation Dataset Since 2023

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  www.nature.com/scientificdata OPEN BDSet: a First-ever BDS Satellite- based PPP augmentation Dataset DATA DeSCRIPToR Since 2023 Chenhao Ouyang 1,2, Junbo Shi1 ✉, Cheng Hou1, Wenjie Peng1, Jiming Guo1 & Yibin Yao1 the BDS precise point positioning (PPP) service broadcasts state space representation (SSR) corrections via PPP-B2b augmentation signals.
To maximize research potentials of the service, this study develops a first-ever BDS PPP-B2b augmentation dataset since January 2023, named BDSet.
